children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In carrying out the provisions of this chapter, the Secretary shall issue regulations under this chapter only to the extent that such regulations are necessary to ensure that there is compliance with the specific requirements of this chapter.
violates or contradicts any provision of this chapter; or

procedurally or substantively lessens the protections provided to children with disabilities under this chapter, as embodied in regulations in effect on (particularly as such protections related to parental consent to initial evaluation or initial placement in special education, least restrictive environment, related services, timelines, attendance of evaluation personnel at individualized education program meetings, or qualifications of personnel), except to the extent that such regulation reflects the clear and unequivocal intent of Congress in legislation.July 20, 1983

children.heading: Public comment period
children.label: c Public comment period
children.text: The Secretary shall provide a public comment period of not less than 75 days on any regulation proposed under subchapter II or subchapter III on which an opportunity for public comment is otherwise required by law.
violate or contradict any provision of this chapter; or
establish a rule that is required for compliance with, and eligibility under, this chapter without following the requirements of .section 553 of title 5
such response is provided as informal guidance and is not legally binding;
when required, such response is issued in compliance with the requirements of ; andsection 553 of title 5
such response represents the interpretation by the Department of Education of the applicable statutory or regulatory requirements in the context of the specific facts presented.

children.heading: Correspondence from Department of Education describing interpretations of this chapter
children.label: f Correspondence from Department of Education describing interpretations of this chapter

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall, on a quarterly basis, publish in the Federal Register, and widely disseminate to interested entities through various additional forms of communication, a list of correspondence from the Department of Education received by individuals during the previous quarter that describes the interpretations of the Department of Education of this chapter or the regulations implemented pursuant to this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: identify the topic addressed by the correspondence and shall include such other summary information as the Secretary determines to be appropriate; and

children.label: B
children.text: ensure that all such correspondence is issued, where applicable, in compliance with the requirements of .section 553 of title 5
